---
title: "UAV in Environmental Science"
id: material-2
order: 41
summary: "UAV in Environmental Science - an Overview"
source_url: "https://www.mdpi.com/search?journal=drones&section=1881"
modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - basics
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/material-2.md"
---

Read the abstracts and choose the most interesting article for a brief review:

<https://www.mdpi.com/search?journal=drones&section=1881>

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
